candidate_verifier.input_contract: coverage_source or restricted_closure_surface -> restricted-only terminal composite content

positive_claim: records only the executable verifier surface for a future TerminalComposite(C,T) witness candidate without accepting or inhabiting a candidate
missing_object: accepted executable terminal-composite witness candidate satisfying the input contract
non_claims: does not construct the restricted edge
does not construct the source-field bridge
does not construct a terminal-composite witness
does not inhabit a terminal-composite witness candidate
does not accept a terminal-composite witness candidate
does not prove field-by-field obligation discharge
does not erase the restricted boundary
does not prove the restricted-to-unrestricted lift
does not add SNOLAB or external empirical evidence
next_weakest_point: Implement the candidate verifier as an executable script that rejects non-inhabited TerminalComposite(C,T) witness candidates before any acceptance claim.
